name: Toni Morrison
description: African American novelist, essayist, and academic (1931–2019)
abstract: Chloe Anthony Wofford "Toni" Morrison (born Chloe Ardelia Wofford; February 18, 1931 – August 5, 2019) was an American novelist and editor. She was awarded the Nobel Prize in Literature in 1993.

about_quotes.speaker: Clyde Kerr Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: I performed after Toni Morrison, the great writer. And man she is one of my heroes in life. I love to listen to her speak.
about_quotes.doc_title: Clyde Kerr Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 22, 2006
